content:
Select 
	reports.trafficchannelid,
	reports.final,
	reports.compressedreport,
	JSON_AGG(
		JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
			'domains',
					JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
					   'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
					   'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
					   'name', report_domains.name,
					   'weight', report_domains.weight,
					   'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
					)
				
		)
	) AS report,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
           'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
           'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
           'name', report_domains.name,
           'weight', report_domains.weight,
           'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        )
    ) AS domains
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_domains on  report_domains.reportid = reports.id
GROUP BY  reports.trafficchannelid,reports.final,reports.compressedreport;

The 'domains' inside the 'report' array is an object. I want to change that to an array of objects

To change the 'domains' inside the 'report' array from an object to an array of objects, you can modify the JSON_AGG function for 'domains' to include JSON_BUILD_OBJECT for each row in the report_domains table. Here is an updated version of the query:

```
SELECT 
    reports.trafficchannelid,
    reports.final,
    reports.compressedreport,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'domains',
            JSON_AGG(
                JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                    'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
                    'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
                    'name', report_domains.name,
                    'weight', report_domains.weight,
                    'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
                )
            )
        )
    ) AS report,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
            'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
            'name', report_domains.name,
            'weight', report_domains.weight,
            'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        )
    ) AS domains
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_domains ON report_domains.reportid = reports.id
GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport;
```

In this version, the JSON_AGG function for 'domains' is nested inside the JSON_AGG function for 'report', creating an array of domain objects within each report object.

ERROR:  aggregate function calls cannot be nested
LINE 8: JSON_AGG(

Apologies for the error. The issue is that you cannot nest aggregate function calls directly within each other. In this scenario, you can make use of a subquery to achieve the desired result. Here's the modified query incorporating a subquery:

```sql
SELECT 
    trafficchannelid,
    final,
    compressedreport,
    JSON_AGG(report) AS report,
    JSON_AGG(domains) AS domains
FROM
    (SELECT 
        reports.trafficchannelid,
        reports.final,
        reports.compressedreport,
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'domains',
            JSON_AGG(
                JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                    'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
                    'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
                    'name', report_domains.name,
                    'weight', report_domains.weight,
                    'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
                )
            )
        ) AS report,
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
            'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
            'name', report_domains.name,
            'weight', report_domains.weight,
            'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        ) AS domains
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_domains on report_domains.reportid = reports.id
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, report_domains.campaigns, report_domains.domainid, report_domains.name, report_domains.weight, report_domains.feedsource) AS subquery
GROUP BY trafficchannelid, final, compressedreport;
```

In this updated query, the subquery is used to first generate the individual report and domains objects using JSON_BUILD_OBJECT and JSON_AGG functions. Then, the outer query performs JSON_AGG on the subquery results grouped by the desired fields. This will allow the 'domains' field to be an array of objects within the 'report' array.

Select 
	reports.trafficchannelid,
	reports.final,
	reports.compressedreport,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
           'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
           'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
           'name', report_domains.name,
           'weight', report_domains.weight,
           'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        )
    ) AS domains
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_domains on  report_domains.reportid = reports.id
GROUP BY  reports.trafficchannelid,reports.final,reports.compressedreport;

I want to return the values returned on domains inside an array called domains

To return the values from the 'domains' column inside an array called 'domains', you can use a subquery in combination with the ARRAY_AGG function. Here's the updated query:

```sql
SELECT 
    trafficchannelid,
    final,
    compressedreport,
    ARRAY_AGG(domains) AS domains
FROM
    (SELECT 
        reports.trafficchannelid,
        reports.final,
        reports.compressedreport,
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
            'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
            'name', report_domains.name,
            'weight', report_domains.weight,
            'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        ) AS domains
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_domains on report_domains.reportid = reports.id
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, report_domains.campaigns, report_domains.domainid, report_domains.name, report_domains.weight, report_domains.feedsource) AS subquery
GROUP BY trafficchannelid, final, compressedreport;
```

In this updated query, the subquery retrieves the individual 'domains' objects using JSON_BUILD_OBJECT. Then, the outer query uses ARRAY_AGG to aggregate those objects into an array called 'domains' for each grouping of trafficchannelid, final, and compressedreport.

SELECT 
    trafficchannelid,
    final,
    compressedreport,
    ARRAY_AGG(domains) AS domains
FROM
    (SELECT 
        reports.trafficchannelid,
        reports.final,
        reports.compressedreport,
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
            'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
            'name', report_domains.name,
            'weight', report_domains.weight,
            'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        ) AS domains
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_domains on report_domains.reportid = reports.id
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, report_domains.campaigns, report_domains.domainid, report_domains.name, report_domains.weight, report_domains.feedsource) AS subquery
GROUP BY trafficchannelid, final, compressedreport;

The query you provided looks correct. It selects the trafficchannelid, final, compressedreport columns, and uses a subquery to generate the domains column as an array using ARRAY_AGG and JSON_BUILD_OBJECT functions. It groups the results by trafficchannelid, final, and compressedreport.

If you have any further questions or need additional assistance, feel free to ask!

Select 
	reports.trafficchannelid,
	reports.final,
	reports.compressedreport,
	reports.date,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
           'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
           'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
           'name', report_domains.name,
           'weight', report_domains.weight,
           'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
        )
    ) AS domains
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_domains on  report_domains.reportid = reports.id
GROUP BY  reports.trafficchannelid,reports.final,reports.compressedreport,reports.date;

Select 
	reports.date AS date,
    reports.trafficchannelid AS trafficchannelid,
    reports.final AS final,
    reports.compressedreport AS compressedreport,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
           'campaignid', campaignid,
           'funneltemplateid', funneltemplateid,
           'campaignidrt', campaignidrt,
           'adGroups', (
                SELECT JSON_AGG(
                    JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                       'adgroupid', report_adgroups.adgroupid,
                       'ad', (
                            SELECT JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                               'adid', report_ads.adid,
                               'adname', report_ads.adname,
                               'adgroupname', report_ads.adgroupname,
                               'campaignname', report_ads.campaignname,
                               'date', report_ads.date,
                               'total_spent', report_ads.total_spent,
                               'total_click', report_ads.total_click,
                               'total_impressions', report_ads.total_impressions,
                               'revenue', report_ads.revenue,
                               'estimate', report_ads.estimate,
                               'feedsource', report_ads.feedsource,
                               'clickdetail', (
                                    SELECT JSON_Build_OBJECT(
                                       'track_id', report_ads_clickdetail.track_id,
                                       'domain_id', report_ads_clickdetail.domain_id
                                    )
                                    FROM report_ads_clickdetail
                                    WHERE report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
						    		LIMIT 1
                                )
                            )
                            FROM report_ads
                            WHERE report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
						    LIMIT 1
                        )
                    )
                )
                FROM report_adgroups
                WHERE report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id
				LIMIT 1
            )
        )
    ) AS details
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_details on  report_details.report_id = reports.id 
LEFT JOIN report_adgroups on report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id 
LEFT JOIN report_ads on report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
LEFT JOIN report_ads_clickdetail on report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
WHERE reports.trafficchannelid ='1148711119076948'
GROUP BY  reports.trafficchannelid,reports.final,reports.compressedreport, reports.date;

I want to left join these two queries on reports.date,trafficchannelid,compressedreport.
After joining the two I want to select details and domains inside an object called, which will hold the two.

To join the two queries, select 'details' and 'domains' inside an object called 'result', you can use a subquery or a Common Table Expression (CTE) to combine the two queries and perform the join. Here's an example using a subquery:

```sql
SELECT 
    joined_queries.date,
    joined_queries.trafficchannelid,
    joined_queries.final,
    joined_queries.compressedreport,
    JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
        'details', joined_queries.details,
        'domains', joined_queries.domains
    ) AS result
FROM (
    SELECT 
        reports.trafficchannelid,
        reports.final,
        reports.compressedreport,
        reports.date,
        JSON_AGG(
            JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
               'campaigns', report_domains.campaigns,
               'domainid', report_domains.domainid,
               'name', report_domains.name,
               'weight', report_domains.weight,
               'feedsource', report_domains.feedsource
            )
        ) AS domains
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_domains ON  report_domains.reportid = reports.id
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, reports.date
) AS subquery1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        reports.date AS date,
        reports.trafficchannelid AS trafficchannelid,
        reports.final AS final,
        reports.compressedreport AS compressedreport,
        JSON_AGG(
            JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
               'campaignid', campaignid,
               'funneltemplateid', funneltemplateid,
               'campaignidrt', campaignidrt,
               'adGroups', (
                    SELECT JSON_AGG(
                        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                           'adgroupid', report_adgroups.adgroupid,
                           'ad', (
                                SELECT JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                                   'adid', report_ads.adid,
                                   'adname', report_ads.adname,
                                   'adgroupname', report_ads.adgroupname,
                                   'campaignname', report_ads.campaignname,
                                   'date', report_ads.date,
                                   'total_spent', report_ads.total_spent,
                                   'total_click', report_ads.total_click,
                                   'total_impressions', report_ads.total_impressions,
                                   'revenue', report_ads.revenue,
                                   'estimate', report_ads.estimate,
                                   'feedsource', report_ads.feedsource,
                                   'clickdetail', (
                                        SELECT JSON_Build_OBJECT(
                                           'track_id', report_ads_clickdetail.track_id,
                                           'domain_id', report_ads_clickdetail.domain_id
                                        )
                                        FROM report_ads_clickdetail
                                        WHERE report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
                                        LIMIT 1
                                    )
                                )
                                FROM report_ads
                                WHERE report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
                                LIMIT 1
                            )
                        )
                    )
                    FROM report_adgroups
                    WHERE report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id
                    LIMIT 1
                )
            )
        ) AS details
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_details ON  report_details.report_id = reports.id 
    LEFT JOIN report_adgroups ON report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id 
    LEFT JOIN report_ads ON report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
    LEFT JOIN report_ads_clickdetail ON report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
    WHERE reports.trafficchannelid ='1148711119076948'
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, reports.date
) AS subquery2 ON subquery1.date = subquery2.date AND subquery1.trafficchannelid = subquery2.trafficchannelid AND subquery1.compressedreport = subquery2.compressedreport
```

In this example, the two queries are combined using subqueries and then joined on reports.date, trafficchannelid, and compressedreport. The result object is created using JSON_BUILD_OBJECT, with 'details' and 'domains'. Make sure to adjust the join conditions based on your specific requirements.

In the below query there is a field called 'clickdetail', it is a JSON_BUILD_OBJ . I want to change it to a JSON_AGG of all the objects in it.

SELECT 
        reports.date AS date,
        reports.trafficchannelid AS trafficchannelid,
        reports.final AS final,
        reports.compressedreport AS compressedreport,
        JSON_AGG(
            JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
               'campaignid', campaignid,
               'funneltemplateid', funneltemplateid,
               'campaignidrt', campaignidrt,
               'adGroups', (
                    SELECT JSON_AGG(
                        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                           'adgroupid', report_adgroups.adgroupid,
                           'ad', (
                                SELECT JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                                   'adid', report_ads.adid,
                                   'adname', report_ads.adname,
                                   'adgroupname', report_ads.adgroupname,
                                   'campaignname', report_ads.campaignname,
                                   'date', report_ads.date,
                                   'total_spent', report_ads.total_spent,
                                   'total_click', report_ads.total_click,
                                   'total_impressions', report_ads.total_impressions,
                                   'revenue', report_ads.revenue,
                                   'estimate', report_ads.estimate,
                                   'feedsource', report_ads.feedsource,
                                   'clickdetail', (
                                        SELECT JSON_Build_OBJECT(
                                           'track_id', report_ads_clickdetail.track_id,
                                           'domain_id', report_ads_clickdetail.domain_id
                                        )
                                        FROM report_ads_clickdetail
                                        WHERE report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
                                        LIMIT 1
                                    )
                                )
                                FROM report_ads
                                WHERE report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
                            )
                        )
                    )
                    FROM report_adgroups
                    WHERE report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id
                )
            )
        ) AS details
    FROM reports
    LEFT JOIN report_details ON  report_details.report_id = reports.id 
    LEFT JOIN report_adgroups ON report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id 
    LEFT JOIN report_ads ON report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
    LEFT JOIN report_ads_clickdetail ON report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
	WHERE reports.trafficchannelid = '1148711119076948' AND reports.date = '2023-09-21'
    GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, reports.date

To change the 'clickdetail' field to a JSON_AGG of all the objects within it, you can modify the innermost subquery and use JSON_AGG instead of JSON_BUILD_OBJECT. Here's the updated query:

```sql
SELECT 
    reports.date AS date,
    reports.trafficchannelid AS trafficchannelid,
    reports.final AS final,
    reports.compressedreport AS compressedreport,
    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
           'campaignid', campaignid,
           'funneltemplateid', funneltemplateid,
           'campaignidrt', campaignidrt,
           'adGroups', (
                SELECT JSON_AGG(
                    JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                       'adgroupid', report_adgroups.adgroupid,
                       'ad', (
                            SELECT JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                               'adid', report_ads.adid,
                               'adname', report_ads.adname,
                               'adgroupname', report_ads.adgroupname,
                               'campaignname', report_ads.campaignname,
                               'date', report_ads.date,
                               'total_spent', report_ads.total_spent,
                               'total_click', report_ads.total_click,
                               'total_impressions', report_ads.total_impressions,
                               'revenue', report_ads.revenue,
                               'estimate', report_ads.estimate,
                               'feedsource', report_ads.feedsource,
                               'clickdetail', (
                                    SELECT JSON_AGG(
                                        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
                                           'track_id', report_ads_clickdetail.track_id,
                                           'domain_id', report_ads_clickdetail.domain_id
                                        )
                                    )
                                    FROM report_ads_clickdetail
                                    WHERE report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
                                )
                            )
                            FROM report_ads
                            WHERE report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
                        )
                    )
                )
                FROM report_adgroups
                WHERE report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id
            )
        )
    ) AS details
FROM reports
LEFT JOIN report_details ON report_details.report_id = reports.id 
LEFT JOIN report_adgroups ON report_adgroups.report_details_id = report_details.id 
LEFT JOIN report_ads ON report_ads.report_adgroups_id = report_adgroups.id
LEFT JOIN report_ads_clickdetail ON report_ads_clickdetail.report_ads_id = report_ads.id
WHERE reports.trafficchannelid = '1148711119076948' AND reports.date = '2023-09-21'
GROUP BY reports.trafficchannelid, reports.final, reports.compressedreport, reports.date;
``
